# Test apx release submit error paths and state guards

# --- T009: submit with missing manifest ---
! exec apx release submit
stderr 'no release manifest found'
stderr 'prepare'

# --- T010: submit with failed manifest state ---
cp failed-manifest.yaml .apx-release.yaml
! exec apx release submit
stderr 'failed state'
stderr 'something went wrong'

# --- submit with already-published state (no-op) ---
cp published-manifest.yaml .apx-release.yaml
exec apx release submit
stdout 'already published'

# --- submit with canonical-pr-open state reports existing PR ---
cp pr-open-manifest.yaml .apx-release.yaml
exec apx release submit
stdout 'already submitted'
stdout 'https://github.com/acme/apis/pull/42'

# --- release inspect shows PR metadata ---
cp pr-open-manifest.yaml .apx-release.yaml
exec apx release inspect
stdout 'PR URL:      https://github.com/acme/apis/pull/42'
stdout 'PR number:   42'
stdout 'PR branch:   apx/release/proto-payments-ledger-v1/v1.2.0'

# --- dry-run shows branch name without side effects ---
cp prepared-manifest.yaml .apx-release.yaml
exec apx release submit --dry-run
stdout 'Dry-run mode'
stdout 'apx/release/proto-payments-ledger-v1/v1.2.0'
stdout 'Would submit release successfully'
# Verify manifest state is unchanged after dry-run
exec cat .apx-release.yaml
stdout 'state: prepared'

-- failed-manifest.yaml --
schema_version: "1"
state: failed
api_id: proto/payments/ledger/v1
format: proto
domain: payments
name: ledger
line: v1
source_repo: github.com/acme/apis
source_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
requested_version: v1.2.0
canonical_repo: github.com/acme/apis
canonical_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
tag: proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.2.0
error:
  code: SUBTREE_FAILED
  message: something went wrong
  phase: submit

-- published-manifest.yaml --
schema_version: "1"
state: package-published
api_id: proto/payments/ledger/v1
format: proto
domain: payments
name: ledger
line: v1
source_repo: github.com/acme/apis
source_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
requested_version: v1.2.0
canonical_repo: github.com/acme/apis
canonical_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
tag: proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.2.0

-- pr-open-manifest.yaml --
schema_version: "1"
state: canonical-pr-open
api_id: proto/payments/ledger/v1
format: proto
domain: payments
name: ledger
line: v1
source_repo: github.com/acme/apis
source_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
requested_version: v1.2.0
canonical_repo: github.com/acme/apis
canonical_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
tag: proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.2.0
pr_number: 42
pr_url: https://github.com/acme/apis/pull/42
pr_branch: apx/release/proto-payments-ledger-v1/v1.2.0

-- prepared-manifest.yaml --
schema_version: "1"
state: prepared
api_id: proto/payments/ledger/v1
format: proto
domain: payments
name: ledger
line: v1
source_repo: github.com/acme/apis
source_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
requested_version: v1.2.0
canonical_repo: github.com/acme/apis
canonical_path: proto/payments/ledger/v1
tag: proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.2.0
